title: Lib + bin crate split
body: src/lib.rs re-exports all modules as pub; src/main.rs is a thin CLI wrapper using the lib. Required for integration tests in tests/ to access internals.

title: LLM invoked via sh -c with stdin/stdout
body: alzai sync shells out to an LLM CLI configured via ALZAI_LLM_CMD env var or --llm-cmd flag. Prompt is piped to stdin, response read from stdout. No embedded LLM, no HTTP API — keeps the tool simple and LLM-agnostic.

title: Atomic write pattern: temp + fsync + rename
body: facts/*.md and state/topic_offsets.json use atomic writes (write to .tmp in same dir, fsync, rename). Event log uses append + fsync instead. Fact file is written before offset — if interrupted, next sync re-synthesizes (wasted work, no inconsistency).

title: Repo discovery walks upward for .agents/memory/facts/
body: RepoPaths::discover() walks from cwd upward looking for .agents/memory/facts/ directory. Works from any subdirectory of the repo, similar to how git finds .git/.
